ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "index" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the observation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the observation */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity_pct" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "visibility_m" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "dew_point_c" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "solar_radiation_mj_m2" REAL /* Solar radiation in megajoules per square meter */,
  "rainfall_mm" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "snowfall_cm" REAL /* Snowfall in centimeters */,
  "atmospheric_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "wind_direction_deg" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the observation was made */,
  "holiday" TEXT /* Indicates if the day is a holiday */,
  "functioning_day" TEXT /* Indicates if the day is a functioning day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_month" INTEGER /* Starting month of the season */,
  "end_month" INTEGER /* Ending month of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index of the corresponding weather data */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of data quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks about the data quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_index FOREIGN KEY ("index") REFERENCES weather_data ("index")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Meteorologist, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station providing the forecast */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_temperature_c" REAL /* Predicted temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "predicted_humidity_pct" REAL /* Predicted humidity percentage */,
  "predicted_wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Predicted wind speed in meters per second */,
  "predicted_precipitation_probability" REAL /* Predicted precipitation probability */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Forecast model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Storm Warning, Heat Advisory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert expires */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Weather station associated with the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station providing the historical data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical record */,
  "average_temp_c" REAL /* Average temperature for that year */,
  "total_rainfall_mm" REAL /* Total rainfall for that year */,
  "total_snowfall_cm" REAL /* Total snowfall for that year */,
  "average_wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Average wind speed for that year */,
  "total_sunshine_hours" REAL /* Total sunshine hours for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Visualization data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)
